item.title: Orders are clear
item.description:
If you are National Guard or Active Duty military and you are being ordered to violate the Constitutional rights of US citizens then this is the number to the Gl Rights Hotline. There is support, you don't have to go through with it. tel:1-877-447-4487
Remember we serve the Constitution for the preservation of our democracy. The protection of the American people, American hopefuls, and our continued sovereignty. Remember we do not follow illegal orders. It is illegal for us to operate against the United States citizens. We are not to invade our own country
item.dc:creator: JustGridSquares

item.title: Swedish government abandons Greta Thunberg. Israel illegally kidnapped her and 11 others in international waters, and are currently being held prisoners.
item.description:
Link to tweet: https://x.com/EyeonPalestine/status/1932165436969468308
Link to article: https://www.pbs.org/newshour/world/gaza-bound-aid-boat-with-greta-thunberg-on-board-arrives-in-israel-after-its-seizure Keep in mind that she was kidnapped at gunpoint in international waters and is now being held prisoner at this moment. No laws were broken except by Israeli forces. And the Swedish government doesn't have the gall to say anything against Israel, not even for their own citizens.

item.title: What Happened Today #130
item.description: Yesterday, I wrote that the collision was coming fast. Its early skirmishes started today although thankfully not from the 2,700 additional troops Trump ordered into Los Angeles. Trump's government tried today to silence everyone who knows things: firing vaccine experts, threatening newspapers, detaining reporters on live air. But the people with actual expertise fired back. Scientists wrote unprecedented public declarations about the inhumane way medical is being thwarted. Courts blocked more of his policies. Even his own supporters started jumping ship. More collisions happened every time someone who actually understands science, law, or basic decency decided they've had enough. Join them. Help them. Meanwhile, don't rely on the algorithm. Let me send this free and private summary to you every night so that you never miss what's going on. Add your email on the homepage of GovBrief.today #GovBriefToday #Resist 1. https://go.govbrief.today/rfk-fires-vaccine-board 2. https://go.govbrief.today/nih-bethesda-declaration 3. https://go.govbrief.today/la-protests-day4 4. https://go.govbrief.today/lanza-apache-copper-mine 5. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-admin-drop-nh-suit 6. https://go.govbrief.today/hegseth-congress-testify 7. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-fights-dugan-dismissal 8. https://go.govbrief.today/judge-reconsider-refugee 9. https://go.govbrief.today/local-police-ice 10. https://go.govbrief.today/cnn-reporter-detained 11. https://go.govbrief.today/latinas-for-trump 12. https://go.govbrief.today/green-resigning-congress 13. https://go.govbrief.today/fed-at-will-employees 14. https://go.govbrief.today/lindell-election-denial-trial 15. https://go.govbrief.today/reset-trigger-suit 16. https://go.govbrief.today/desantis-orlando-sentinel 17. https://go.govbrief.today/ftc-ad-boycott 18. https://go.govbrief.today/wh-groundbreak-rose-garden Yesterday - https://go.govbrief.today/army-terror-graffiti Fighting Back - https://go.govbrief.today/smithsonian-board-sajet Free & Private Daily Subscription - https://govbrief.today Yesterday's Spotlight digital newsletter since I've been asked to include the link each week: https://87ow6.r.sp1-brevo.net/mk/mr/sh/6rqJ8GoudeITQFildkuzq3WjqZo/PinZbMyeFoBA Remember - still without chat response access.

item.title: I recently lost some weight, so please welcome a mostly silent kitchen dump.
item.description:
A blooming onion
2. Spicy Chicken Croquettes.
3. Whatever is this.. I want it immediately.
4. Hand-made Sugar Donuts.
5. Cake making machines.
6. Apple Blossom Tea from Oyoppi Cafe, Tokyo.
7. The Most Unique Way To Bake Chicken With Mud.
8. Tornado omelette.
9. Kibiti - an amazing chicken recipe from India.
10. Airport Cafeteria. Better bring your own sammiches.
11. Fastest Cutting.
12. A little pizza machine.
13. This technique of making a Chinese pancake.
14. Candyman Traditionally Making Hard Candy Chocolate Drops At Schimpff's EST.1891
15. Cavatelli pasta. There are simple and cheap machines to make allsort little pasta.
16. Cutting a potato into a mesh
17. How Parmesan cheese is cut in the factory.
18. How this bacon is cut.
19. Making noodles the old way.
20. Soba noodles being cut.
21. The making of the Japanese mentakio cheese rolled omelet. There's no much cheese.
22. How to make mayo. Don't forget some mustard !

item.title: Calling it out
item.dc:creator: HorrorMango

item.title: A Glorious Meme Dump.
item.description:
Poor little dudes going through a REALLY bad breakup.
Oh no, how sad, truly I'm heartbroken.
I'm not sure whether the contradicting mommy BOYfriend is on purpose or not and that concerns me.
My moneys on the golden retriever, those guys can eat like nobodies' business.
The beast cannot be tamed
I've stared at this for almost an hour and it STILL just looks like her pants have fallen down.
... Is this the second coming of Genghis Khang?
Yup Genghis Khan is back.
No one can fight the primal urge to dig a hole and be a dwarf.
Overly polite, son, lets me be immune to anything if it means I can apologize for no real reason.
Dude I do this all the time, where I just state something I thought was common knowledge and suddenly I've deeply insulted people. I don't even see what I said as an insult but it happens all the time.
I've never been in such a perfect state of mortified and captivated. I can't stop rewatching. Help.
Another late night dump accomplished. In my usual updates of gamer/autistic nerd excitement, the new httyd live action is coming out soon and I am hesitant but excited. I just hope it's not like the lilo and stitch fiasco cause that was an abomination. As always if you're interested in seeing me be an idiot while gaming check out my twitch channel: https://www.twitch.tv/kid_krominator And I wish you all a very wonderful night!
item.dc:creator: KidKrominator

Carles Dalmau
Foo Midori
Chiara Bautista
Suggested Track Playlists: (HIT SHUFFLE) YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLoIzKPbKfwniKOaadw-tB8kaEQiUQ1Yp4 Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/playlist/6cqV52puia81vNnPHxcz1W?si=yoUknxpQQVql9E-NZRQ4 *TOGGLE MATURE CONTENT IN SETTINGS TO VIEW OUR POSTS* ICM SQUAD: @vazquezdaniel, @ohvalleyofplenty, @nichoDriver, @Dirgekins, @onewallpaperaweek, @thedownlowe, @TheForbiddenSemicolon, @bagoffishstix, @JayKillBam, @majkongskull, @DingoJ0nes, @HandsomePenguin, @MrJwinkyface, @Gorgoror, @ciadmillefailte, @kaeldra ICM TIP JAR: https://www.patreon.com/InterwebChexMix Just to let you know, we do not take credit for any random art, comics, or photos featured in this collection; we only take credit for the daily effort of compiling the collections themselves. Like what we do and how we do it? Leave a tip. Or don't. It's totally cool either way. Stay True & Stay Tuned - Meta Pathos

item.dc:creator: WazertFromBlueSky

item.title: Painted myself as Ciri from The Witcher - MCroft07
item.description: This was tricky, the belts were super detailed! Thanks for all the nice comments, it's appreciated. Now for the big whammy faq Faq: I use body paint and do these in a mirror No, it is not AI I've tried to play The Witcher, but honestly I think I have open world game burnout, there was too much to do and I got fed up pretty quickly. So instead I've been watching a playthrough online where they have cut out unnecessary fighting/travelling and I'm enjoying it a lot more! I use professional body paint covers (pasties) this means I am not wearing a top but I am also not naked. I paint myself, I make the props myself, I film myself, and I also edit. This is my full time thing now (yayy) I paint these by looking in a mirror, with brushes, and paint It takes between 6-12 hours each Body painting myself is my hobby/passion I do own clothes It doesn’t tickle “Why don’t you just wear clothes” once again, body painting myself is my hobby/passion. I am painting my skin, I am not wearing a suit - but that does not mean I am naked. I know, even I think this is a ridiculous set of questions I have to constantly answer I did not go to art school, I am self taught. Talent gets you so far, but this is a learned skill. The paint isn’t edible (gross) I've been painting myself for 16 years. The 07 does not mean I was born in 2007, UK 7 is my shoe size No, I don't need help painting my back, I don't want to paint my back, I don't need to paint my back. (also gross) No, I don't need help washing it off. (also you are gross) If you want to see more I am MCroft07 on IG, twitter, Tiktok, YouTube I paint them live on twitch I like doing the lip syncs, they're fun for me while I paint them. I couldn’t care less if you think they’re cringe. I am cringe but I am free My tattoos on my ribs are from Tomb Raider - I am a big TR fan I do not have an OF but if you want to send me money THAT badly you can just tip my twitch account. Haha. The shower afterwards takes about 15 minutes, I use a regular sponge and shower gel. The reason why it can look different at the end is because I am wearing a wig, I promise you it is not a different person because the hair changed. While on this topic, if my eyes change colour it’s because I am wearing contact lenses. (Those with an IQ above 10… I know. Even I’m shocked the wig thing is a frequent comment). I use body paint. It doesn’t tickle, I am very ticklish and this is fine. I don’t have an allergic reaction to the paint, but if you do it, you should always do a patch test first I do not know where you can buy body paint in every country. I know in the UK it is available at FacePaintingshop.com. I use a plethora of different brands, it’s best to search for them yourself online. I don’t work in Hollywood, I don’t want to. I just want to improve my body painting for myself. I am English, not American. I do not go outside like this to scare people. 1, that would be very cold. 2, in this current age, everyone would take photos without me knowing and it would likely dox me :)))))) I’m not a sweaty person, but if I was this would be a lot more difficult. Thank you to those of you who came from Imgur to my Twitch channel! “What’s the point in painting yourself when you can wear clothes?” all my clothes are in the laundry, had to resort to this, tough life It would not be quicker to jump into a pool of paint - think of the drying time?! If you're still here hold me accountable, I need to tidy my desk! I don’t care that I wash it off at the end, I get to reuse this canvas, we love a reduce, reuse, recycle queen. I am not the lady who did the Maneskin video, it’s a cool video and she slayed, but it isn’t me. Some of you don't like these transition videos, that's fine, I have timelapses, spins, talking videos that I post more on my other socials so go watch me there. I just don't want to spam the imgur page :) Being part of the FAQ is not always fun, I tend to block people before they make it on the list. I can promise you there is not *a man* painting these and I am pretending to paint myself. I am genuinely painting myself. I know a lot of you don’t like reading this faq because it is horrid to see that I have to answer all of these. Unfortunately I have noticed that when I don’t put in all the icky things then I get more gross comments and I just have to spend more time blocking people so it’s better to call it out. I just copy and paste it each time anyway.
item.dc:creator: MCroft07

item.title: This kid is going places
item.dc:creator: Discoball10

item.title: Let’s learn about some interesting colors!
item.description:
Vermillion: #E34234 Vermilion is made from cinnabar, or mercury sulfide. It is toxic.
Cinnabar
Gamboge: #E49B0F Gamboge is made from the sap of a tree native to Cambodia, whence it took its name (it was known as Camboja back in the day).
When you hear about Buddhist monks wearing saffron-colored robes, they’re really dyed with gamboge, as saffron is, pound for pound, one of the most expensive substances on the planet — hardly something likely to be found among members of an ascetic order).
Carnelian: #B31B1B Carnelian gets its name from the semi-precious gemstone Carnelian, one of the many forms of chalcedony. It is one of the official colors of Cornell University.
Carnelian agates
Scarlet: #FF2400 Scarlet has been around since before Biblical times, and long associated with royalty. It is also the traditional color of cardinals; whether birds, ball players, or priests.
These tiny scaly insects (Kermes vermilio) are the original source of scarlet. Fun fact: vermilion got its name because it resembled scarlet, so was named after the bug used to make that pigment. They don’t look like worms, though, so why they’re called “vermilio” is a mystery.
Sanguine: #BC3F4A Sanguine is derived from the Latin word for blood. It is also one of the heraldic “stains,” that is, a tincture outside of the usual vert, azure, gules, purpure, and sable, being darker than ordinary red (gules). In medieval medicine, health was thought to be governed by four “humors” and someone with an abundance of blood (manifesting by being friendly and good-tempered) was characterized as sanguine. Conversely, it also means gory or bloody.
Cerise: #DE3163 It’s named after the French for “cherry.”
Rufous: #A81C07 It is called after the Latin word for “red.” William II, the second Norman king of England, was nicknamed “Rufus” for his red hair.
Rufous Hummingbird
Puce: #CC8899 Puce was originally a darker reddish brown, and took its name from the French for “flea,” after the flea poop found in bed linens at the French court.
Cochineal: #960018 Named after the insect which produces it, cochineal is also called carmine, which gets its name from carminic acid, a substance produced by the insect that discourages others from eating it. It’s still used in a lot of cosmetics, so vegans and vegetarians should always check ingredients.
Cochineal And now for some other interesting colors…
Murrey: #C54B8C The color of mulberries, murrey is another heraldic stain, an alternative to purpure.
International Orange (Golden Gate Bridge): #F04A00 The Golden Gate Bridge is not a “golden” gate-style bridge. It is a bridge over the Golden Gate, the strait connecting San Francisco Bay to the Pacific. It is painted this color to make it easier to see in bad weather. A slightly brighter shade of orange is used for astronaut flight suits at launch, to make them easier to spot in case they have to ditch in the ocean.
The first plane to break the sound barrier, Chuck Yeager’s Bell X-1 “Glamorous Glennis,” was painted a darker shade to make it more visible during test flight.
Indian Yellow: #E3A857 It was used extensively as a pigment in Southeast Asian Indian art and textiles until the early twentieth century.
It is said to be made by collecting and concentrating the urine from cows fed exclusively on mango leaves and water.
Xanthous: #F1B42F Its name derives from the ancient Greek for “yellow” or “gold.” This is also the root word of xanthophyll, a naturally-occurring pigment that gives egg yolks their color, as well as leaves and vegetables.
Chartreuse: #DFFF00 It is named after the French liqueur which was made by monks in the Chartreuse Mountains from a recipe dating from 1605. There are yellow and green versions, just like the liqueurs.
Green Chartreuse: #80FF00
Yellow and green Chartreuse liqueurs
Paris Green: #50C878 Also known as emerald green, after the gemstone. It is made from arsenic, and one of the most toxic pigments known to man. It was the first chemical insecticide and was the result of trying to find a better alternative to Scheele’s Green, which tended to change color over time.
Self Portrait of Vincent Van Gogh
Scheele’s Green: #478800 This pigment is also highly toxic. Despite this, it was widely used in wallpaper, paint for children’s toys(!), and even desserts. The story goes that Napoleon’s favorite color was green, so he lived out his days in a house painted with Scheele’s green, and it may have contributed to the stomach cancer that killed him.
“Woman Embroidering” by Georg Friedrich Kersting
Smaragdine: #50C878 Another pigment sometimes called emerald green.
Smaragdine Table, also known as the Emerald Tablet, is an ancient text attributed to Hermes Trismegistus
Verdigris: #43B3AE The “verd” part of the name comes from the French for green, but reports differ on the rest, variously being attributed derivations of “grey,” “vinegar,” or “Greece.” It is obtained by scraping off the oxidized patina that forms on copper or other metals when exposed to the elements.
This is why the Statue of Liberty is green (she is made of copper sheets and was quite shiny when first erected).
Smalt: #003399 Smalt is glass prepared with the addition of cobalt compounds to the molten glass. It is also used in pottery as a glaze as well as drinkware.
Cobalt glass bottles
Zaffre: #0014A8 Made from roasted cobalt ore, it is a component of smalt.
Prussian Blue: #003153 This is my favorite shade of blue. It is the first “modern” synthetic pigment and is used in technical schematics (that’s why they’re called blueprints), in addition to many industrial, scientific, and medicinal applications as well as in art.
Great Wave Off Kanagawa
Pantone 448: #4A412A Dubbed “the ugliest color in the world,” in 2012 Australia began using it (along with graphic images of the long-term effect smoking has on the body) on tobacco product packaging to make them less appealing, and many other countries have followed suit. Go ahead and do a Google image search for “Australian Cigarette Packaging” if you dare.
Eigengrau: #16161d German for “intrinsic grey,” it is the color you see when you close your eyes in a dark room.
https://www.youtube.com/shorts/UpqZ4N9XWbM Her channel (https://www.youtube.com/@bekahart/shorts) is full of her swatching rare and unusual colors and worth a look. And here is a really interesting video about the Forbes Pigment Collection at the Harvard Art Museums: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=rApTzWboLrA
item.dc:creator: KalliJ

item.title: Didnt know Disney plus does ads now until I saw this meme. Thank goodness I unsubscibed long ago!
item.dc:creator: athenatan666

item.title: Concerning if true.
item.description: https://m.economictimes.com/news/international/us/kamala-harris-won-the-u-s-elections-bombshell-report-claims-voting-machines-were-tampered-with-before-2024/articleshow/121732679.cms I’m not sure about the reputability of this news outlet, but this is huge if it’s true. Unfortunately Trump republicans have already gotten ahead of this inevitability, they spent 4 years screaming about election fraud and stolen election, and there was a purpose for that, it was to dilute the word, to muddy the waters, to ensure when actual legitimate evidence of election fraud surfaced, it would be largely dismissed as a “no you!” This is also why they keep calling everything an “insurrection” and keep saying “Biden crime family” because it effectively discredits the actual real accusations of the trump crime family and the actual January 6th insurrection, we’ve already seen that strategy work on multiple things, so it’s likely to work on evidence and accusations that the 2024 election was stolen. Also keep in mind that Trump and republicans actually did try to steal the 2020 election despite screaming about stolen election the whole time, with the multistate fake electors scheme in which multiple defendants had been found guilty and disbarred and had begun to cooperate with authorities. Of course that whole case has gone out the window since Trump owns everything now, he killed all his criminal trials and everything else related to their crimes including that fake electors scheme. https://en.m.wikipedia.org/wiki/Trump_fake_electors_plot. It would stand to reason if Trump and republicans already tried to steal one election, what makes you think they’d just give up trying?
item.dc:creator: capnadorable

item.title: This we will defend
item.description:
Fp Edit: Folks, be safe and look out for one another. If you want to find me elsewhere follow this link. https://linktr.ee/GridSquares We do not serve a singular leader. If you are National Guard or Active Duty military and you are being ordered to violate the Constitutional rights of US citizens then this is the number to the Gl Rights Hotline. There is support, you don't have to go through with it. tel:1-877-447-4487 Source https://youtube.com/shorts/ICcqACt1L9U?si=8Oze0vwoA1x47bUr
https://abcnews.go.com/US/live-updates/la-immigration-protests-live-updates-trump-deploys-2000/?id=122621279

item.title: 4th Largest Economy
item.description:
https://imgur.com/gallery/la-violence-against-unarmed-peaceful-words-upcoming-protests-etc-7KINakP
https://imgur.com/gallery/la-violence-against-unarmed-peaceful-words-upcoming-protests-etc-7KINakP
item.dc:creator: AnonymousMockingjay
